title: RESOURCE PACK FOR GIRLS
description: IT CHANGES MAJOR ITEM ACCORDING TO GIRLS
body:
Welcome to a world of endless charm and enchantment! This resource pack was lovingly created to transform your Minecraft experience into a cozy, aesthetic adventure, full of whimsy and warmth. Say goodbye to the mundane and hello to a palette of soft pastel colors, cute textures, and charming details that will make every block and every build a true delight. 
This pack retextures every part of your world to be more visually pleasing. From the newly painted wooden planks and brick blocks that create a softer, more inviting home, to the gentle, desaturated tones of the landscape, you'll find beauty at every turn. Leaves on trees are fuller and more vibrant, and flowers have been lovingly updated to look more lush, creating the perfect cottagecore vibe. Even the utility blocks have received an aesthetic upgrade, fitting seamlessly into your adorable builds. 
But the charm doesn't stop with just the blocks. You'll also discover cute and playful retextures for items, mobs, and the user interface. Your inventory and menus will have a clean, clear, and feminine feel, and animals might just look a little more cuddly. Whether you're decorating a dream cottage, building an enchanted garden, or simply exploring the beautiful new biomes, this resource pack is designed to provide a serene and creative escape for every girl who loves Minecraft. It’s time to build the fairytale world you've always imagined.
